title: CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 at cbse.gov.in, and students can now use the official direct link given here to check and download their CBSE 12th marksheet online.

content.text: CBSE has released the Class 12 Result 2026 for the current academic session for all streams, including Science, Commerce and Arts, on the official result portals. The CBSE 12th result has been announced online on 13 May 2026 on the official website, cbse.gov.in.

Students can now access their digital marksheet by logging in with their roll number, school number, date of birth and admit card ID as mentioned on the admit card. The online scorecard can be downloaded and saved as a provisional marksheet for admission and documentation purposes until schools issue the original marksheets.

After checking their scores, students should carefully verify all details on the marksheet, including personal information, subject-wise marks and overall result status. In case of any discrepancy in personal details or marks, they must promptly contact their school or the concerned CBSE regional office for correction.

CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 has been announced on 13 May 2026 for all streams. The CBSE 12th result 2026 is now available online on official websites such as cbse.gov.in, cbseresults.nic.in and results.cbse.nic.in, along with DigiLocker and UMANG platforms. Students can visit any of these official portals, log in with their credentials and download their digital marksheet for future admission and documentation purposes.

CBSE has activated the CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 direct links on its official portals after the declaration of the result on 13 May 2026. Students can now click on the CBSE 12th Result 2026 link and log in using their credentials to instantly view or download their marksheet for Science, Commerce and Arts streams.

rows: CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 - Official CBSE Portal

sections.heading: How to check CBSE Class 12 Result 2026 online

items: Open the official CBSE website cbse.gov.in or directly visit the result portals cbseresults.nic.in or results.cbse.nic.in when the result is declared.
Click on the link that says "CBSE Class XII Result 2026" or "Senior School Certificate Examination (Class XII) Results 2026".
On the login page, enter your roll number, school number, date of birth and admit card ID as mentioned on the CBSE admit card 2026.
Verify the details and click on the "Submit" or "Proceed" button to view your CBSE 12th result 2026 on the screen.
Check your subject wise marks, total marks, percentage and overall result status, then download the online marksheet as a PDF and take a printout for future use.
Cross check all details carefully and contact your school or CBSE regional office if you notice any discrepancy in the marksheet.
